name: Overdue Item Escalation Drafter
description: Turn a list of overdue action items, audit findings, or unanswered requests into staged reminder-and-escalation messages — a friendly nudge, a formal reminder, or a management escalation, calibrated to how overdue each item is.
author: accilium

variables.name: OVERDUE_ITEMS
variables.description: List of open items with due date, owner, and days overdue (or enough detail to derive it).
variables.example: 1) Sign vendor NDA — owner Legal, due 2026-06-20; 2) Submit audit evidence pack — owner Finance Ops, due 2026-06-15, 2nd reminder...

variables.name: ESCALATION_LADDER
variables.description: Who receives escalations at each stage, if a defined process exists.
variables.example: Tier 2 copies the team lead; Tier 3 goes to the PMO director

variables.name: TONE
variables.description: Desired tone of voice for the reminders.
variables.example: Professional and firm, no sarcasm, assume good faith at tier 1

example_input: OVERDUE_ITEMS: audit evidence pack overdue 12 days, owner Finance Ops; ESCALATION_LADDER: tier 3 to PMO director; TONE: firm but professional
